title: Adak says Kenya will have a very clean team at Olympics in Paris
author: Ochieng Oyugi
description: So far over 1500 athletes have met anti-doping requirements while 67 athletes have qualified for the Summer Games.
keywords: ["Paris 2024 Olympics","Kenya Enhanced Anti-Doping Project","Anti-Doping Agency of Kenya (Adak)","Athletics Integrity Unit (AIU)"]
